title: Fed Holds Interest Rates Steady

source.title: Fed holds interest rates steady as inflation hits 3-year high

segments.title: Rates Stay Steady
segments.audioText: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady on Wednesday as the economy weathers its highest inflation in three years.
segments.transcript: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady on Wednesday as the economy weathers its highest inflation in three years.
segments.translationZh: 聯邦儲備局星期三維持利率不變，而美國經濟正面對三年以來最高嘅通脹。

points.label: held interest rates steady
points.explanationZh: held...steady 即保持不變；聽到 interest rates 就知道係利率。

points.label: as the economy weathers
points.explanationZh: as 呢度係『當／在……情況下』；weather 作動詞係頂住、承受。

points.label: highest inflation in three years
points.explanationZh: 最高通脹加時間範圍；先抓 highest inflation，再聽 in three years。

segments.title: A New Fed Chair
segments.audioText: The announcement marked the first decision on interest rates since Trump nominee Kevin Warsh took the helm as Fed chair.
segments.transcript: The announcement marked the first decision on interest rates since Trump nominee Kevin Warsh took the helm as Fed chair.
segments.translationZh: 呢次公布標誌住 Kevin Warsh 接任聯儲局主席之後，第一次作出利率決定。

points.label: marked the first decision
points.explanationZh: marked 係新聞常用字，意思係『標誌住』一個重要時刻。

points.label: on interest rates
points.explanationZh: on 後面講決定關於咩；呢度係關於利率。

points.label: took the helm
points.explanationZh: take the helm 即接掌、掌舵；喺職位新聞入面好常見。

segments.title: Inflation Target
segments.audioText: Speaking at a press conference, Warsh voiced a commitment to bring inflation down to the Fed's desired level of 2%.
segments.transcript: Speaking at a press conference, Warsh voiced a commitment to bring inflation down to the Fed's desired level of 2%.
segments.translationZh: Warsh 喺記者會上表示，佢承諾要將通脹降返去聯儲局希望嘅百分之二水平。

points.label: Speaking at a press conference
points.explanationZh: 句首用 -ing 開場，先交代場景：喺記者會上講。

points.label: voiced a commitment
points.explanationZh: voiced 即表達；commitment 係承諾，語氣正式。

points.label: bring inflation down
points.explanationZh: bring...down 即降低；新聞講通脹時好常用。

points.label: desired level of 2%
points.explanationZh: desired level 即目標水平；2% 要聽成 two percent。

segments.title: Members Agree
segments.audioText: All 12 members of the FOMC voted to hold interest rates steady, meaning Warsh and his predecessor, former Fed Chair Jerome Powell, agreed on the rate decision.
segments.transcript: All 12 members of the FOMC voted to hold interest rates steady, meaning Warsh and his predecessor, former Fed Chair Jerome Powell, agreed on the rate decision.
segments.translationZh: 聯邦公開市場委員會全部十二名成員都投票維持利率不變，意思係 Warsh 同佢嘅前任、前聯儲局主席 Jerome Powell 喺呢次利率決定上意見一致。

points.label: All 12 members
points.explanationZh: 聽數字加名詞：All twelve members，表示所有成員。

points.label: voted to hold interest rates steady
points.explanationZh: voted to 後面係投票要做嘅事；hold rates steady 即維持利率不變。

points.label: his predecessor
points.explanationZh: predecessor 即前任；新聞常用嚟比較新舊官員。

points.label: agreed on the rate decision
points.explanationZh: agreed on 表示就某件事達成一致；rate decision 即利率決定。

sentences: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady on Wednesday as the economy weathers its highest inflation in three years.
The announcement marked the first decision on interest rates since Trump nominee Kevin Warsh took the helm as Fed chair.
Speaking at a press conference, Warsh voiced a commitment to bring inflation down to the Fed's desired level of 2%.
All 12 members of the FOMC voted to hold interest rates steady, meaning Warsh and his predecessor, former Fed Chair Jerome Powell, agreed on the rate decision.

vocabulary.example: The Federal Reserve makes decisions about interest rates.
vocabulary.translationZh: 聯邦儲備局會作出關於利率嘅決定。

vocabulary.example: Higher interest rates can make loans more expensive.
vocabulary.translationZh: 較高利率會令貸款更貴。

vocabulary.example: The bank kept the rate steady.
Inflation makes everyday items cost more.
vocabulary.translationZh: 通脹會令日常用品變貴。

vocabulary.example: The announcement came after the meeting.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢個公布喺會議之後發出。

vocabulary.example: The chair voiced a commitment to lower inflation.
vocabulary.translationZh: 主席表示承諾要降低通脹。

vocabulary.example: She followed the policy of her predecessor.

phrases.example: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady.
Kevin Warsh took the helm as Fed chair.
The Fed wants to bring inflation down to 2%.
The members agreed on the rate decision.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:00 跟讀第一句，將 The Federal Reserve / held interest rates steady / on Wednesday 分成三段。
重播 00:29，先聽寫 bring inflation down，再補 the Fed's desired level of 2%。
用 held...steady 練替換：The company held prices steady this month.
用兩句英文複述：The Fed kept interest rates steady. Officials still want to bring inflation down.

notes: 今日片段係 ABC News 約 2 分鐘短新聞，主題係聯儲局利率決定同通脹，適合練財經新聞常見字。
聽力重點係 numbers and policy words：12 members、2%、interest rates、inflation。先聽數字，再聽動詞。
時間碼 00:00、00:13、00:29、00:51 可以逐句重播；每次只跟一個 chunk，唔需要一次過追晒成句。
dailyLifePractice 會避開投資建議，轉去輕鬆日常場景：點餐、退貨同 rideshare 溝通。

dailyLifePractice.title: Ordering a Simple Lunch
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺午餐店想快快落單，順便問價錢同飲品選擇。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, can I get the chicken bowl, please? Does that come with a drink? I'll do iced tea if that's included.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, can I get the chicken bowl, please?
lines.zh: 你好，我想要雞肉飯碗，唔該。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Does that come with a drink?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll do iced tea if that's included.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: I'll do... 係美式點餐好自然，意思係『我要……』。if that's included 可以禮貌咁確認有冇包埋，唔會聽落計較。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 chicken bowl 換成 salad、turkey sandwich 或 veggie wrap。
drills.example: Can I get the turkey sandwich, please?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Does that come with a drink? 三次。
drills.example: Does that come with a drink?

dailyLifePractice.title: Returning a Small Item
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你買咗一件小物品，但返屋企發現唔啱用，想禮貌退貨。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, I'd like to return this. It doesn't fit what I need. I have the receipt right here.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, I'd like to return this.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: No problem. Was anything wrong with it?
lines.zh: 冇問題。件貨有咩問題嗎？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: It doesn't fit what I need.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I have the receipt right here.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: It doesn't fit what I need 比 It is bad 柔和好多，適合講產品本身冇壞，只係唔啱你用。right here 令句子自然同即場感強。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I'd like to... 講你想換貨。

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 職員問 Was anything wrong with it? 用一句自然英文回答。
drills.example: No, it just doesn't fit what I need.

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking a Rideshare Pickup
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你搭 rideshare，想確認司機喺邊度接你，語氣簡短清楚。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, I'm by the main entrance. Are you able to pull up near the curb? I'll be outside in a blue jacket.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, I'm by the main entrance.

lines.speaker: Driver
lines.en: Got it. I'm about two minutes away.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Are you able to pull up near the curb?
lines.zh: 你可唔可以喺路邊停低？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll be outside in a blue jacket.
lines.zh: 我會喺出面，著住藍色外套。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Are you able to...? 比 Can you...? 稍微柔和，適合請司機配合。pull up near the curb 係美國日常搭車好常用嘅講法。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 main entrance 換成 lobby、front desk 或 coffee shop。

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 扮乘客，用一句話講你喺邊度同著咩衫。
drills.example: I'm by the front desk in a black hoodie.
